Preview did not load. Open preview in browser panel

Use this URL in Simple Browser: http://127.0.0.1:8081/preview-frame.html · Metro: Terminal → Run Build Task, or Ctrl+Shift+P → Tasks: Run Build Task → YourStrat: Mobile Preview, or .\scripts\start-dev.ps1. Ctrl+Alt+B in this workspace. Ctrl+Shift+B only when the editor is focused—not in Simple Browser.
